name: Facet
description: Diamonds fading out from the center in a manhattan-distance ramp, each one breathing to its own scale on every redraw.

code.style: --gem: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --sc: @rand(0.45, 0.85); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: var(--gem); opacity: @calc(1 - 0.8 * (abs(@x - (@X + 1) / 2) + abs(@y - (@Y + 1) / 2)) / ((@X + @Y) / 2)); transform: rotate(45deg) scale(var(--sc)); } transition: ease 500ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
